_schemaDescription: Risk Assessment – Heat Map sample payload. Universe-level view: 10 entities total, 0 scored. All entities unscored. Color zones and priority items are empty as there are no scored items to categorize.

_drillDownExamples.universe: This payload (all entities in audit universe)
_drillDownExamples.entity: If user clicks 'DMI Finance' → viewContext.currentLevel becomes 'entity', itemType becomes 'layer', contextPath becomes 'DMI Finance', colorDistribution shows layers of DMI Finance
_drillDownExamples.layer: If user clicks 'Consumer Layer' → itemType becomes 'process', contextPath becomes 'DMI Finance > Consumer Layer'
_drillDownExamples.process: If user clicks 'Dealer Management' → itemType becomes 'risk', contextPath becomes 'DMI Finance > Consumer Layer > Dealer Management'

colorDistribution.description: 0 scored entities: All 10 entities are unscored. No risk distribution available.

priorityItems.description: No scored entities available to determine top priority items.
